UPCOMING BOOT CAMPS

March 1998
Journalism & Newsroom

The article announces upcoming investigative journalism boot camps and workshops scheduled for May through August 1998 at various locations, with both basic and advanced training options available.

UPCOMING BOOT CAMPS: MAY 10-15, 1998 - ADVANCED BOOT CAMP IN CHAPEL HILL, N.C. MAY 17-22, 1998 - BASIC BOOT CAMP IN COLUMBIA, Mo. JULY 12-17, 1998 - BASIC BOOT CAMP IN COLUMBIA, Mo. AUGUST 9-14, 1998 - BASIC BOOT CAMP AUGUST 14-16, 1998 - ADVANCED BOOT CAMP ON INTRANETS IN COLUMBIA, Mo. FOR A COMPLETE LISTING OF BOOT CAMPS AND WORKSHOPS, ALSO VISIT OUR WEB SITE AT WWW.IRE.ORG/RESOURCES/CONFERENCES/TRAINING
